scripts.dev: npm run kill-ports && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:server: cd server && PORT=6000 npm run dev
scripts.dev:client: cd client && VITE_API_TARGET=http://127.0.0.1:6000 npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.db:push: cd server && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:seed: cd server && npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: cd server && npx prisma migrate reset
